title: Le Kay included in CSA rural team
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Jermaine Lekay from the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Jermaine Lekay from the Garden Route Badgers rural team was included in the CSA Rural Coastal team following the CSA Rural tournament for Coastal provinces that was recently held in Vredenburg.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Jermaine Lekay from the Garden Route Badgers rural team was included in the CSA Rural Coastal team following the CSA Rural tournament for Coastal provinces that was recently held in Vredenburg."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lekay plays for the Harlequins Forces Club in Oudtshoorn. The coach of the team, Pieter Stuurman, will be the head coach of the CSA Rural team for Coastal provinces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Coastal- and inland teams will play a match from where the CSA National Rural team will be selected.","html":"The Coastal- and inland teams will play a match from where the CSA National Rural team will be selected."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Rural Coastal team is:","html":"The Rural Coastal team is: "},{"type":"list","items":["Sinethemba Tshomela (Border Aloes)","Jermaine Lekay (Garden Route Badgers)","C Katyna (Kei) Warrick Ebrahim (Boland)","Curtley Deelman (Boland)","Tuanrico Vorster (Boland)","Devin Smith (Boland)","Bongolwethu Makeleni (Border Aloes)","Sifiso Maketo (Border Villages)","Tsewu Luxolo (Border Country)","Toshug van Rensburg (EP Grahamstown)","Brian Upman (EP Grahamstown)","Tongile Kilan (EP Grahamstown)","Jurie Noval (EP Grahamstown)","James Noval (EP Grahamstown)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coach: Pieter Stuurman (Garden Route Badgers)","html":"Coach: Pieter Stuurman (Garden Route Badgers)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Manager: Mello Daniels (EP Grahamstown)","html":"Manager: Mello Daniels (EP Grahamstown)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Le Kay included in CSA rural team
